title: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Young Professional Posts
post_name: Research Associate, Young Professional II, Young Professional I
short_info: The ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) Research Associate (MOEFCC-I), Young Professional II & Young Professional I Notification 2026 has been released on 30 May 2026 on the official website ICAR-IARI. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR-IARI Research Associate (MOEFCC-I), Young Professional II & Young Professional I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age for all posts is 45 years. Age relaxation: Maximum age for RA is 40 years (age relaxation of five years for SC/ST & women and three years for OBC).

qualification.education_qualification: PhD in Environmental Sciences/Plant Physiology, Master’s degree (First class) in Environmental Sciences, Bachelor’s degree
qualification.details: Research Associate (MOEFCC-I): PhD in Environmental Sciences/Plant Physiology from a recognized university/institution. Five years of research experience in greenhouse gas emission measurement from rice fields and emission factor development. Desirable: Experience in chromatographic GHG analysis, volatilization losses, crop modeling, and data analysis software. Young Professional II: Master’s degree (First class) in Environmental Sciences from a recognized university/institution. Two years of experience in GHG measurement and gas chromatographic analysis. Desirable: Proficiency in data analysis software and soil plant analysis. Young Professional I: Bachelor’s degree from a recognized university/institution. At least one year of experience in GHG sampling and chromatographic analysis. Desirable: Working experience of gas chromatograph and canopy analyzer.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 61000/- + HRA, Rs. 42000/- consolidated, Rs. 30000/- consolidated
salary_details.details: Research Associate (MOEFCC-I): Rs. 61000/- + HRA Young Professional II: Rs. 42000/- consolidated Young Professional I: Rs. 30000/- consolidated

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
